title: satureja lasiophylla subsp. palmensis
intro: Satureja lasiophylla subsp. palmensis, also known as Palmense Savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja lasiophylla plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Satureja lasiophylla subsp. palmensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
